heroImageAlt: A volunteer assisting a wheelchair user into a Dove Cottage accessible vehicle
heroShortDescription: Ensuring Compassionate Care Is Accessible When You Need It.
mainIntro1: Our transport service is available to enable patients to attend for a full day, independently from a carer.
mainIntro2: It is provided by fully trained volunteers using their own cars or our Dove fleet of three wheelchair-assisted vehicles. Please note that this service is subject to availability, geographical location, and is chargeable per day.

sectionImage1.alt: A volunteer assisting a wheelchair user into a Dove Cottage accessible vehicle

serviceBody: We aim to make it easier for people to access hospice support by reducing practical barriers to attending day hospice.
additionalIntro: As a day patient here at Dove you also have access to the full range of our additional day services which are listed below:
referralIntro: To make a referral to our hospice please complete the
referralOutro: and someone will get in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about transport support or make a referral.
